ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the individual */,
  "age_years" INTEGER /* Age of the individual in years */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the individual (1: male, 2: female) */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the individual in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the individual in kilograms */,
  "height_feet" REAL /* Height of the individual in feet */,
  "weight_pounds" REAL /* Weight of the individual in pounds */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the individual */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email for contact purposes */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the individual was registered in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_pressure" (
  "bp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the blood pressure record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "ap_hi" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure (mmHg) */,
  "ap_lo" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure (mmHg) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_pressure_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cholesterol_levels" (
  "cholesterol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cholesterol record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level (1: normal, 2: above normal, 3: well above normal) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cholesterol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cholesterol_levels_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "glucose_levels" (
  "glucose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the glucose record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "gluc" INTEGER /* Glucose level (1: normal, 2: above normal, 3: well above normal) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("glucose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glucose_levels_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the lifestyle record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "smoke" INTEGER /* Smoking status (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "alco" INTEGER /* Alcohol consumption status (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Physical activity status (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Dietary habits */,
  "smoking_status_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about smoking habits */,
  "alcohol_consumption_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about alcohol consumption */,
  "physical_activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about physical activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cardio_health" (
  "cardio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cardiovascular health record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "cardio" INTEGER /* Cardiovascular health status (0: healthy, 1: disease) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the cardiovascular health status was determined */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Treatment status (e.g., 'active', 'completed') */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment started */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cardio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cardio_health_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bmi_data" (
  "bmi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the BMI record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "BMI" REAL /* BMI value calculated from height and weight */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bmi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bmi_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "height_weight_records" (
  "hw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the height-weight record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight in kilograms */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_height_weight_records_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the health visit record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the health visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the health visit */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the health visit */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the visit took place */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who conducted the visit */,
  "prescriptions" TEXT /* Prescriptions given during the visit */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made during the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_visits_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)
